name: Holographic Control Bar
description: A floating, detachable toolbar that follows user focus with glassmorphic depth treatment. Can dock to any viewport edge or float freely via drag-to-reposition. Semi-transparent with backdrop blur and subtle border luminance. For spatial UIs, immersive workspaces, creative tools, and any interface where persistent controls must not occlude content.

floating.description: Free-floating bar positioned via drag. Glassmorphic: backdrop-filter blur, semi-transparent background, 1px luminant border. Casts a subtle shadow. PositionIndicator shows current screen quadrant.

docked-bottom.description: Snapped to bottom viewport edge. Full-width with centered action groups. Glassmorphic backdrop with top border only. Slide-up entry animation.

docked-side.description: Snapped to left or right viewport edge. Vertical action layout. Narrow width, icon-only by default with labels on hover. Glassmorphic with inward-facing border.

minimal.description: Collapsed to a small floating pill showing only the drag handle and an expand toggle. Expands on click to reveal full action groups. Lowest visual footprint.

slots.toolbar-track: The invisible boundary area where the bar can be positioned. Defines valid floating zones and dock-snap regions. DockTarget elements mark edge snap points. Typically the full viewport.
slots.action-group: One or more grouped sets of toolbar actions. Each ActionGroup contains related buttons or controls separated by subtle dividers. Groups should be semantically labeled for screen readers.
slots.drag-handle: The grab target for repositioning the bar. Renders as a subtle grip pattern (dots or lines). Must be large enough for touch (44x44px minimum). Shows grab cursor on hover, grabbing on drag.
slots.dock-zone: Edge regions where the bar snaps when dragged nearby. Each DockTarget defines a snap threshold (e.g., 40px from edge). Visual indicator appears when bar enters snap range. Supports top, bottom, left, right edges.
slots.floating-indicator: Visual feedback showing the bar's current position state: floating (no indicator), near-dock (glow at target edge), docked (subtle connection line to edge). PositionIndicator also announces position changes to screen readers.

announcements: Announce dock state changes: 'Control bar docked to bottom', 'Control bar floating'
Announce when bar is dragged to a new position
keyboard: Tab navigates between action groups, then between actions within each group
Arrow Left/Right moves between actions within a group
G key grabs the bar for keyboard repositioning, Arrow keys move, Enter drops
D key cycles between dock positions (float, bottom, left, right)
Escape releases grab or collapses to minimal preset
accessibility.reduce_motion: Disable slide and snap animations. Dock transitions are instant. Glassmorphic blur remains (decorative, not motion). Drag repositioning uses position jumps rather than smooth tracking.

responsive.mobile: Default to docked-bottom preset. Drag-to-float disabled (too imprecise on touch). Swipe down to dismiss, swipe up to restore. Action groups scroll horizontally if overflow.
responsive.tablet: All presets available. Drag handle enlarged for touch (56x56px). Dock snap threshold increased to 60px. Floating position persisted across sessions.
